text: Ingest API Reference The Ingest API accepts documents for parsing and returns a job identifier that can be polled for results. Authentication All requests require a bearer token passed in the Authorization header. Tokens are scoped per project and expire after 90 days. Endpoints POST /v1/parse Submits a document for parsing. The request body is multipart form data with a single file field. file: the document to parse, up to 50 MB. callback_url: optional webhook for completion. GET /v1/jobs Lists recent parse jobs for the authenticated project, newest first, paginated in groups of 25.
